steps.title: Use the triangle area formula
steps.content: For any triangle, $A=\frac{1}{2}bh$. Here, the base is $36$ cm and the height is $80$ cm.

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
With base $= 36$ cm and height $= 80$ cm:
$$A = \frac{1}{2} \times 36 \times 80 = 18 \times 80 = 1440 \text{ square centimeters}$$
